stemHtml: Where and under which of the following conditions is orographic fog most likely to form when the surface wind in a tropical maritime air mass is forecast 270/10 kt?

options.a: On the west-facing slopes of high ground when the air's relative humidity is low.
options.b: On the east-facing slopes of high ground when the air's relative humidity is high.
options.c: On the east-facing slopes of high ground when the air's relative humidity is low.
options.d: On the west-facing slopes of high ground when the air's relative humidity is high.
